001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
005import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
006import androidx.room.Entity;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009
010@Entity(
011    tableName = "incubator",
012    indices = {
013        @Index(value = "name")
014    }
015)
016public class Incubator {
017
018  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
019  @ColumnInfo(name = "incubator_id")
020  private long id;
021
022  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
023  @NonNull
024  private String name;
025
026  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
027  @NonNull
028  private String model;
029
030  @ColumnInfo(name = "target_temperature")
031  private double targetTemperature;
032
033  @ColumnInfo(name = "target_humidity")
034  private double targetHumidity;
035
036  @Nullable
037  private String notes;
038
039  @ColumnInfo(name = "active", defaultValue = "1")
040  private boolean active;
041
042  public long getId() {
043    return id;
044  }
045
046  public void setId(long id) {
047    this.id = id;
048  }
049
050  @NonNull
051  public String getName() {
052    return name;
053  }
054
055  public void setName(@NonNull String name) {
056    this.name = name;
057  }
058
059  @NonNull
060  public String getModel() {
061    return model;
062  }
063
064  public void setModel(@NonNull String model) {
065    this.model = model;
066  }
067
068  public double getTargetTemperature() {
069    return targetTemperature;
070  }
071
072  public void setTargetTemperature(double targetTemperature) {
073    this.targetTemperature = targetTemperature;
074  }
075
076  public double getTargetHumidity() {
077    return targetHumidity;
078  }
079
080  public void setTargetHumidity(double targetHumidity) {
081    this.targetHumidity = targetHumidity;
082  }
083
084  @Nullable
085  public String getNotes() {
086    return notes;
087  }
088
089  public void setNotes(@Nullable String notes) {
090    this.notes = notes;
091  }
092
093  public boolean isActive() {
094    return active;
095  }
096
097  public void setActive(boolean active) {
098    this.active = active;
099  }
100}
